programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.

programme.title: A Lover Scorned
programme.desc: (M) Trapped in a loveless marriage, Brooke begins an affair with Jake a young, hotshot insurance-agent.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: (M) Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess crashes on shore and is taken in by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she recovers, she realizes she's wandered out of one trap into another.

programme.title: A Lifeguard'S Obsession
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
